sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَعُدِ التَّعْلِيمُ يَنْتَهِي بِمُجَرَّدِ الْحُصُولِ عَلَى الشَّهَادَةِ الْجَامِعِيَّةِ فِي عَصْرِنَا الرَّاهِنِ.
sentences.translation: Obrazovanje se u našem sadašnjem vremenu više ne završava samo sticanjem univerzitetske diplome.
sentences.translationEn: Education no longer ends merely with obtaining a university degree in our current era.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ التَّعْلِيمُ الْمُسْتَمِرُّ ضَرُورَةً مُلِحَّةً لِمُوَاكَبَةِ التَّطَوُّرَاتِ التِّكْنُولُوجِيَّةِ السَّرِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Cjeloživotno učenje postalo je hitna potreba za praćenje brzog tehnološkog razvoja.
sentences.translationEn: Continuous education has become an urgent necessity to keep pace with rapid technological developments.

sentences.arabic: يَسْعَى الْمُحْتَرِفُونَ إِلَى اكْتِسَابِ مَهَارَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ مِنْ خِلَالِ الدَّوْرَاتِ التَّدْرِيبِيَّةِ عَبْرَ الشَّبَكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Profesionalci nastoje steći nove vještine putem online obuka.
sentences.translationEn: Professionals seek to acquire new skills through online training courses.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِانْفِتَاحَ عَلَى الْمَعْرِفَةِ يُعَزِّزُ مِنَ الْفُرَصِ الْوَظِيفِيَّةِ وَيَرْفَعُ كَفَاءَةَ الْفَرْدِ فِي سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Otvorenost prema znanju poboljšava mogućnosti zapošljavanja i podiže efikasnost pojedinca na tržištu rada.
sentences.translationEn: Openness to knowledge enhances career opportunities and increases an individual's efficiency in the labor market.

sentences.arabic: فَالْعَقْلُ الْمُتَعَطِّشُ لِلْعِلْمِ هُوَ السِّلَاحُ الْأَقْوَى لِمُوَاجَهَةِ تَقَلُّبَاتِ الِاقْتِصَادِ الْعَالَمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Um žedan znanja najjače je oružje za suočavanje s kolebanjima globalne ekonomije.
sentences.translationEn: A mind thirsty for knowledge is the strongest weapon for facing the fluctuations of the global economy.
